calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Eden Foods, Inc.
Off Calendar Dec-29-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher Tuttle, Esq. 510-848-8880 of the Chanler Group for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WHITNEY LEEMAN, PH. D.'s Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Eden Foods, Inc. is Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the Health and Safety Code.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR# 6840, mlyon@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/AYSC)
